zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线偏强震荡上行
zh.content:
AVAX/USD目前运行于9.49附近，价格连续站稳20日均线9.36上方，显示短线买盘力量有所恢复。24小时涨幅接近2%，并逼近日内高点区域，整体走势呈现温和反弹结构，但上方抛压仍未完全释放。

从技术指标观察，MACD维持正值并继续向上扩散，说明多头动能正在增强，短期趋势偏向积极。虽然RSI数据暂缺，但结合价格结构与均线角度判断，市场情绪已从弱势震荡逐步转向多头试探阶段。

关键支撑位可关注9.33附近，该区域是日内低点与短期防守位置，一旦跌破可能重新回到弱势整理。上方首个阻力位位于9.52附近，若有效突破，则有机会进一步测试9.70至9.85区间的压力带。

操作策略上，短线交易者可考虑依托9.33支撑低吸布局，并关注突破9.52后的放量情况。若成交量同步放大，多头延续概率将明显提升；但若冲高回落明显，则需警惕获利盘引发的快速回调风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche is currently trading at $9.4972, showing a modest 1.77% gain over the last 24 hours. The intraday range of $9.3332 to $9.5131 suggests a period of consolidation, with the market finding short-term equilibrium. The price staying above the 20-period simple moving average at $9.3595 indicates that buyers are maintaining control and the short-term trend remains bullish. Momentum appears steady, with the latest MACD value of 0.0295 suggesting a gradual build-up in buying pressure.

Although the RSI data is unavailable, the positive price movement coupled with the MACD crossing above zero hints at continued bullish sentiment. Traders should watch for the MACD to maintain a rising trajectory, as it could signal further upward momentum. The 20-period SMA offers dynamic support near $9.36, reinforcing this level as a key point for buyers to enter or add to positions. Intraday retracements toward this SMA may present low-risk buying opportunities for short-term traders.

Resistance levels are apparent near the daily high of $9.5131 and psychological barriers around $9.60. Breaking above these zones could trigger renewed buying, potentially pushing the price toward $9.70–$9.75. Conversely, a failure to hold the SMA or break resistance decisively may lead to a retest of $9.33, which acts as immediate support. Monitoring volume during these price tests will be crucial, as higher volume would confirm stronger conviction in either direction.

For traders, a cautious approach is advisable. Aggressive long positions can be considered on a confirmed break above $9.513, while conservative traders may wait for a pullback near the $9.36 SMA to enter. Stop-loss orders below $9.33 can help mitigate risk in case of sudden downward swings. Overall, Avalanche shows a moderate bullish bias, but confirmation via breaking resistance or sustaining support is key before committing to larger positions.
